svg.title: Node.js Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Layered diagram showing Node.js internals: JS code, Node.js APIs, V8, libuv, and the event loop with thread pool

g.text: Business logic, modules, async/await, callbacks, event emitters
fs · http · crypto · stream · path · events · cluster · worker_threads

svg.text: Single-threaded JS ↕ event loop ↕ async I/O (kernel or thread pool)
